title: Modern Era
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Modern Era''' was the name some scholars living around [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] gave to the time they were living in. It seems to have specifically referred to the era following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''
